arts.ttl: Juventus Director Giuntoli: “Pogba returning? Our squad is complete…..”
arts.sum: Juventus Football Director Cristiano Giuntoli spoke to DAZN before the match against Lazio, addressing several key topics regarding the club’s current situation and future plans. Regarding Paul Pogba, Giuntoli stated, “Our position is very clear: Paul was a great player, but he has been out for a long time. Last year we were forced to make other moves, and now the squad is complete.” On the potential for January transfers, Giuntoli commented, “Bremer’s injury makes us think that the January market could offer us some opportunities, but it’s a complex window, and we’ll have to see how the players perform.” The post Juventus Director Giuntoli: “Pogba returning? Our squad is complete…..” appeared first on FootItalia.com.
